globalNews.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
globalNews.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

globalNews.title: US not 'turning back' on Asia allies, but expects them to boost defence, says Hegseth
globalNews.summary: The US defense secretary is questioned about US commitment, including further arms deals, at an Asian security summit in Singapore.

globalNews.title: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
globalNews.summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges relating to Canadian victims - but families say he should also be charged in the UK over 79 deaths in Britain.

globalNews.title: Nato and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian residential block
globalNews.summary: Romania says the Russian drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defences and altered its trajectory.

globalNews.title: Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave after 10 days
globalNews.summary: Two of the seven villagers who entered the narrow tunnels in search for gold on 20 May are still missing.

cryptoNews.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots
cryptoNews.summary: The SEC charged Texas man Nathan Fuller with raising $12.3 million from 150 investors through a crypto fraud scheme built around fake AI trading bots.

cryptoNews.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak, analyst calls it ‘contrarian indicator’
cryptoNews.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while Ether ETFs bled for 14 consecutive sessions.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin treasury space still has fair share of ‘carnival barkers’: BSTR founder
cryptoNews.summary: BSTR co-founder Sean Bill says many Bitcoin treasury companies lack the “ability to actually deploy Bitcoin.”

cryptoNews.title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in Iranian crypto, Treasury secretary says
cryptoNews.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized roughly $1 billion in Iranian crypto assets, double the figure disclosed in late April.

aiNews.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
aiNews.summary: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.
